intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“picnic -> edge of forest -> rushed up -> strap broke -> in their possession -> ran through trees -> ran after them -> out of breath -> caught up -> contents -> such a fright -> needs mending”的动作链读顺。长句要按动作分意群，so...that 和 such...that 要读出原因推动结果，最后一句要读得平静一点。

sentences.text: Mrs. Anne Sterling did not think of the risk she was taking when she ran through a forest after two men.
sentences.focus_zh: Mrs. Anne Sterling 后轻停；risk she was taking 是“正在冒的风险”；ran through a forest after two men 要读出危险动作，但不要喊。

sentences.text: They had rushed up to her while she was having a picnic at the edge of a forest with her children and tried to steal her handbag.
sentences.focus_zh: rushed up to her 是突然冲上前；picnic at the edge of a forest 要连成野餐地点；tried to steal her handbag 是动作结果。

sentences.text: In the struggle, the strap broke and, with the bag in their possession, both men started running through the trees.
sentences.focus_zh: In the struggle 后轻停；strap broke 要读清楚；with the bag in their possession 是包的位置变化；running through the trees 是逃跑路线。

sentences.text: Mrs. Sterling got so angry that she ran after them.
sentences.focus_zh: so angry that 是“气到所以”；ran after them 是追上去。把 so 和 that 的因果关系读出来。

sentences.text: She was soon out of breath, but she continued to run.
sentences.focus_zh: out of breath 是上气不接下气，要作为一个短语读；but she continued to run 是转折后的继续动作。

sentences.text: When she caught up with them, she saw that they had sat down and were going through the contents of the bag, so she ran straight at them.
sentences.focus_zh: caught up with them 是追上；going through the contents 是翻看包里的东西；ran straight at them 是径直冲过去。长句按三段读。

sentences.text: The men got such a fright that they dropped the bag and ran away.
sentences.focus_zh: such a fright that 是“吓了这么一大跳所以”；dropped the bag and ran away 是两个连续结果。

sentences.text: 'The strap needs mending,' said Mrs. Sterling later, 'but they did not steal anything.'
sentences.focus_zh: needs mending 意思是需要修理；最后一句语气要平静、实际，读出课文结尾的 dry humor。
